title: Claude Code just Changed Website Design Forever
summary: Claude Code enables rapid website creation with an integrated CMS that allows clients to edit content without developer intervention. The system leverages Claude AI to generate responsive designs, extract blueprints from references, and deploy live sites via GitHub and Vercel with MongoDB backend storage.
